compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: Implemented + independently code-reviewed (subagent ran its own real-recorder round-trip; no blockers). Recursive worklist interpreter (interpreter.py) executes branch/loop/map over the v2 IR; control-flow state derived from recorded outputs (POC discipline); WORKFLOW_STEP markers keyed by frame_key=(step_id,iteration path) in the reducer; mandatory max_iterations runaway guard. Replay tests prove exactly-once across EVERY crash point + loop resume + identical final state, plus real recorder/reducer integration tests. Synchronous (Burr tripwire intact, now scanning interpreter.py too); concurrency deferred to 8d8e. 2 MINOR review findings fixed+tested (loud mid-loop condition failure; committed real-recorder test). 171 tests pass, ruff clean. Commit 07edefbf.

compiled_state.description:
## Why
Execute the v2 IR deterministically with run-state on rebar's event log (genuine reuse of the event-sourced
substrate), surviving crashes via replay. This is the deepest risk, de-risked by
docs/experiments/workflow-remediation-pocs/engine_interpreter_poc.py.

## What
Replace static_order with a synchronous worklist interpreter handling conditionals, loops, and map. Core
discipline (POC-proven): control-flow state is derived from RECORDED OUTPUTS, never re-applied out-of-band.
Iteration-keyed idempotency markers (run_id, step_id, iteration); mandatory per-loop max_iterations;
per-iteration nondeterminism capture; side-effect tokens carry the iteration; reuse TicketEventRecorder.

## Scope
- src/rebar/llm/workflow/executor.py (interpreter + run-state)
- src/rebar/reducer/_processors.py (iteration-keyed WORKFLOW_STEP slot)
Single-threaded/synchronous (Burr tripwire intact). Out: concurrency (separate story).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Interpreter executes conditionals, loops, and map over the v2 IR.
- [ ] WORKFLOW_STEP markers keyed by (run_id, step_id, iteration); reducer updated; lazy maps keep hot paths clean.
- [ ] Mandatory per-loop max_iterations enforced (runaway-event guard).
- [ ] Replay tests: kill mid-run -> replay from events -> exactly-once side effects, loop resumes, final state identical.

file_impact.reason: run_workflow delegates to interpreter; frame_key/iteration on StepContext

compiled_state.title: Thin interpreter with event-log run-state and replay correctness
